Question: Reinforcement Learning में agent किस आधार पर सीखता है और उसका लक्ष्य क्या होता है?
Answer: Reinforcement Learning में एक agent trial-and-error के आधार पर सीखता है। उसे या तो rewards मिलते हैं या penalties, और वो अपने rewards को maximize करने की कोशिश करता है — वो खुद ही यह जान लेता है कि कौन सा काम करने से reward maximize होगा।

Question: Deep Learning को 'Black Box' क्यों कहा जाता है और इसकी interpretability की कमी का एक व्यावहारिक उदाहरण क्या है?

Question: What semantic arithmetic example involving Germany, Japan, and sushi is described in the Transformers video, and what does it illustrate?
Answer: In the Transformers video, if you take the vector difference between Germany and Japan and add it to the embedding of 'sushi', you end up very close to the embedding of 'bratwurst'. This illustrates that directions in the word embedding space encode cross-cultural semantic relationships, showing that the model associates certain directions with nationality and associated cultural items.

Question: What is the role of the bias in a neural network, according to the 3Blue1Brown video?
Answer: The bias is an additional number added to a neuron's weighted sum before applying the activation function. It controls the threshold at which the neuron becomes meaningfully active — for example, if you want the neuron to only activate when the weighted sum is bigger than 10, you add a bias of negative 10 to shift that threshold.

Question: 2010 के बाद Deep Learning के इतना famous होने के पीछे कौन से पाँच कारण बताए गए हैं?
Answer: 2010 के बाद Deep Learning के famous होने के पाँच कारण हैं: (1) Data — smartphone revolution और सस्ते internet (Jio) से exponential data generation और public datasets की उपलब्धता; (2) Hardware — GPU, FPGA, ASIC, TPU जैसे specialized hardware; (3) Frameworks — TensorFlow (Google, 2015) और PyTorch (Facebook, 2016) जैसी libraries; (4) Neural Network Architectures — state-of-the-art architectures और Transfer Learning; (5) Community — researchers, engineers और students का योगदान।
